introduction.en_us:
# OPanel MCDR Bridge

A MCDR bridge plugin connecting OPanel and MCDR

Please refer to the official OPanel doc [Connecting to MCDR](https://opanel.cn/en/docs/mcdr-bridge) to configure this plugin.

## License

[MPL-2.0](https://github.com/opanel-mc/mcdr-bridge/tree/main/./LICENSE)
introduction.zh_cn:

一个用于连接OPanel和MCDR的MCDR插件

请参见OPanel官方文档[连接到MCDR](https://opanel.cn/docs/mcdr-bridge)进行配置。
